text.title: Gcp Arch Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns commonly observed when applying the gcp-arch-patterns methodology. Each pairs a symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Zone outage takes the cluster offline.
antipattern.fix: Recreate as regional GKE; migrate workloads via blue/green.

antipattern.symptom: Single-zone outage takes the DB offline; lost RPO.
Pods carry node-level SA keys; credential leak risk.
antipattern.root-cause: GKE cluster has Workload Identity disabled.
antipattern.fix: Enable Workload Identity; bind k8s SA to Google SA per workload.

antipattern.symptom: Application instances serve static assets — wastes compute + cold-start cost.
antipattern.root-cause: Static files served from app container.
antipattern.fix: Move to Cloud Storage + Global LB + CDN.
